relational_batch: per_generator_family_batch: each account's relational features computed only against other accounts of the SAME generator family (52 accounts/batch); generator family used solely to define the unlabelled batch and the leave-one-generator-family-out splits, never as a predictor

embedding_environment.representation: deterministic offline TF-IDF (scikit-learn TfidfVectorizer, word 1-2 grams, min_df=1, L2 norm); per-account centroid = mean of its 8 post vectors, renormalized
embedding_environment.note: The project's neural sentence-embedding instrument (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) could not be executed in this offline analysis environment because HuggingFace model-weight endpoints are network-blocked (403). Stage 3 relational similarity therefore uses a fully reproducible, download-free TF-IDF content representation, frozen in this protocol before any Stage 3 performance was computed. The MiniLM-derived account-level convergence feature is still present in the CCSF/CCSF-LR/hybrid account features. This substitution is documented as a Stage 3 limitation.

note_post_freeze_edit: STAGE3_PROTOCOL.md and this manifest had a single cosmetic post-freeze wording edit: a scope sentence was generalized to remove a named external dataset. The original frozen protocol is preserved in Git history (commits e0fa59a, 7632389). No feature, model, split, graph, threshold, or evaluation specification was changed.
